request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?pkg ?name (COUNT(DISTINCT ?child) AS ?childCount) WHERE {
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  OPTIONAL { ?pkg vocab:Package_packagedElement+ ?child . }
}
GROUP BY ?pkg ?name
ORDER BY DESC(?childCount)
LIMIT 25

request.message: The query returned multiple rdf:type vocab:package elements with their names and counts of packaged children, ordered by size. The results show that the model contains many packages, so the 'main' packages likely correspond to the largest ones (most packaged elements) and we can report top examples from the returned set.
request.reason: The user asked for the main packages; using the returned top 25 by packaged element count provides concrete examples of prominent packages in the model. We will report a short list (top by childCount) with their exact package names and counts as evidence from the query results.
